{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Head Witnesses
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Head Witnesses]] certify when negotiations have concluded to release weapons.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
